title: YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive physical, mental, and dental care services. Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 966-9830 Pharmacy (541) 240-8691 Medical Appointments (541) 240-8499 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of tribal membership AREA SERVED: Umatilla and Union Counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures * Native American Community Childhood Immunization * Native American Community Community Mental Health Agencies * Native American Community Dental Hygiene * Native American Community Emergency Dental Care * Native American Community General Dentistry * Native American Community General Medical Care * Native American Community General Physical Examinations * Native American Community Indian Health Service Clinics Pediatric Dentistry * Native American Community Periodontics * Native American Community Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Native American Community Vaccine Information * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
